chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 4664 of 2024 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.22856/2024 2. For orders on CMA No.20662/2024 3. For hearing of main case 10.12.2024 Mr. Muhammad Adeel Awan advocate holds brief for Mr. Muhammad Saad Shafiq Siddiqui, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Aamir Ali Shaikh advocate holds brief for Mr. Zafar Hussain, advocate for respondent Mr. Darvesh K. Mandhan, advocate for respondent Ms. Rabia Khalid, Assistant Attorney General This is a case where fiscal process has been stalled on the pretext of seeking information of a third party pursuant to Article 19-A of Constitution of Pakistan, 1973. No resort to Right of Access to Information Act, 2017 is discernible, however, despite tenancy of ad-interim orders counsel for the petitioner is absent and adjournment is being sought on his behalf. The instant petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge Amjad
